title: Notifications
description: Configure system notification settings including email alerts, in-app notifications, and webhook integrations. Set up alerts for job completions, system health issues, and important user activity.
tips: Email notifications require a configured mail provider (Resend, SMTP, etc.).
In-app notifications appear in the bell icon in the header.
Configure webhook URLs to integrate with Slack, Teams, or other notification systems.
Set notification preferences per event type to avoid alert fatigue.
Critical system alerts (like database connectivity issues) are always sent regardless of preferences.
